description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 48 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 6 mins. His Wakatime activity was spread across 6 projects, and his coding was mostly in Other (43%), Java (39%), and Markdown (15%). There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded.
